model.label: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
model.description: Leans into cohesion and a few selective upsets

picks.rationale: Duke is too complete to fade in the opener.
VCU is the chosen upset because turnover pressure can bend this matchup.
Saint Mary's keeps the pace where it wants it.
Michigan is the second upset because the offense can spike in a one-game setting.
Even with the VCU upset, Duke still has the cleanest semifinal case.
Saint Mary's gets the path edge against a less stable Michigan ticket.
Duke remains the title pick because no other team combines floor and ceiling as cleanly.

reasoning.title: Macro bracket thesis
reasoning.summary: This card is still Duke-centric, but it hunts a couple of leverage upsets in the 11 and 5 lines.
evidence: VCU is the designated live underdog.
The title path reverts to the most complete favorite.

reasoning.title: Inputs used
reasoning.summary: News and injury context nudged close coin-flip games more than the heavy favorite decisions.
evidence: VCU hype in the digest matters in g2.
No Duke availability concerns preserved the championship pick.
